channel.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless May 20th - May 26th, 2019
item.description:
Blog posts

  • Serverless Instant Checkout Links with Square - An example showing how to build serverless instant checkout links backed by Square APIs.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Apr 15th - Apr 21st, 2019
item.description:
Literature / Education

  • AI as a Service A book that teaches you how to harness the power of cloud-based AI services and serverless computing. An engineering approach to serverless AI.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Feb 11th - Feb 17th, 2019
item.description:
Projects

  • PriceTrackstars79 - API / Website for E-commerce price tracking. Built with Firebase functions and Firebase Hosting.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Jan 21st - Jan 27th, 2019
item.description:
Projects

  • Spiderlessstars173 - A web spider / scraper / website change detector built with Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB and SNS.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Jan 7th - Jan 13th, 2019
item.description:
Related projects

  • OpenFaaS - Serverless Functions Made Simple for Docker and Kubernetes.
  • OpenFaaS Cloudstars746 - OpenFaaS Cloud: multi-user serverless functions driven by git.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Dec 24th - Dec 30th, 2018
item.description:
General

  • Serverless.com - Serverless.com homepage.
  • Documentation - Serverless.com Documentation.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Dec 17th - Dec 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Projects

  • Tipe - Next generation serverless CMS.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Dec 3rd - Dec 9th, 2018
item.description:
Related projects

  • Cirrusstars92 - Serverless machine learning framework.
  • Firecrackerstars15.2k - Secure and fast microVMs for serverless computing.

    • Blog posts

  • Serverless sea change - Article which defines and explains how serverless is different from other application architectures.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Nov 26th - Dec 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Related projects

  • Serverless boilerplatestars243 - Minimal yet super-functional Serverless boilerplate.
  • Handlystars16 - A wrapper for serverless handlers to prevent silly mistakes.

    • Blog posts

  • Writing portable serverless applications - Post on how to write portable serverless applications that can run on different compute environments.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Nov 19th - Nov 25th, 2018
item.description:
Literature / Education

  • Agile development for serverless platforms - How to apply agile practices in fully serverless architectures.

    • Blog posts

  • Serverless monitoring, security, frameworks, tools - Post about the different serverless monitoring, security, framework and tooling solutions.
  • Serverless for startups - Why serverless is the fastest way to build a technology idea.
  • Serverless & Functions - Not one and the same - Post about the differences between serverless computing and FaaS.
  • Takeaways from ServerlessNYC 2018 - Key takeaways from the ServerlessNYC 2018 conference.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Nov 12th - Nov 18th, 2018
item.description:
Blog posts

  • Serverless without containers - How Cloudflare utilizes the v8 engine to isolate and run Cloudflare Workers written in Node.js.

    • Talks

  • Serverless at iRobot - How serverless technologies are used at iRobot.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Nov 5th - Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Related projects

  • TriggerMesh - Serverless cloud with a library of event triggers to enable hybrid cloud and workload portability.
  • Operiant - Connect your event streams to actions.

    • Blog posts

  • Launching TriggerMesh - TriggerMesh (serverless management platform on top of knative) announcement blog post.
  • Hosted vs. installable serverless platforms - Survey which covers hosted vs. installable serverless solutions.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
Blog posts

  • Serverless computing requires a shift in mindset - Why IT leaders must communicate business value when talking about serverless solutions.

    • Related projects

  • Begin - Create AWS serverless apps, APIs, and sites with databases, sessions, and full CI/CD.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Related projects

  • Muttonstars10 - A Python shim library for better AWS Lambda handlers.

item.description:

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Talks

  • Serverless state of the union - Austen Collins keynote talk about serverless and the state of the union at the Open Source Summit 2018.

item.title: pmuens/awesome-serverless Sep 24th - Sep 30th, 2018
item.description:

item.description:
Projects

item.description:
